meaning: 托皮卡[美国堪萨斯州首府]
examples: At Topeka, Kansas, he sketched the outline of a crop control measure.
For politicians from Butte to Topeka, the question now is whether this good fortune will continue.
When Daryl Hendrix got the call that the twins were being born, he sped to his local hospital in Topeka, Kansas.
According to Topeka Capital Market analyst Brian White, this is exactly what is going to happen.
Then he got funding to train coaches for every school in Topeka, and he has been expanding his program ever since.
